# EthicalGovernanceOf (ethicalgovernanceof.ai)

> Map one policy to every framework.

Build a certified AI governance program once and crosswalk it across ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF and the EU AI Act — with controls, evidence and certification readiness in one place.

## What this is
EthicalGovernanceOf is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- ai-governance-crosswalk-mcp.map: Crosswalk a control or policy across ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF and the EU AI Act from any agent.
- iso-42001-readiness-mcp.assess: Return ISO 42001 certification readiness with gaps and required evidence.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://ethicalgovernanceof.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://ethicalgovernanceof.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://ethicalgovernanceof.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://ethicalgovernanceof.ai/pricing/
